summary: Comprehensive testing of Image Compression and SEO features. All backend APIs working correctly (11/11 tests passed). Frontend Admin SEO Panel fully functional with all 4 sections (Global SEO, Organization Schema, Robots.txt, Sitemap) and Test Rich Results button working correctly.

passed: POST /api/upload/image - PNG converts to WebP with compression (71.3% savings)
POST /api/upload/image - JPG converts to WebP with compression
POST /api/upload/image with convert_webp=false - Keeps JPG format but still compresses (58.5% savings)
POST /api/upload/image with convert_webp=false - Keeps PNG format
POST /api/assets - Image upload compresses and converts to WebP with compression stats
GET /api/site-settings/seo - Returns all SEO configuration (global_seo, organization_schema, robots, sitemap)
GET /api/seo/robots.txt - Returns dynamically generated robots.txt with disallowed paths
GET /api/seo/robots.txt - Contains sitemap reference
GET /api/seo/sitemap.xml - Returns dynamically generated XML sitemap
GET /api/seo/sitemap.xml - Contains static pages (/films, /blog, /armory, /work-with-us)
GET /api/seo/sitemap.xml - Contains dynamic film URLs
Admin login works correctly
STUDIO tab accessible
SEO subtab visible under STUDIO
SEO Settings panel loads correctly
All 4 SEO sections visible (Global SEO, Organization Schema, Robots.txt, Sitemap)
Global SEO section has all fields (Site Name, Production URL, Meta Title Template, Meta Description, OG Image URL, Focus Keyword)
Robots.txt section has Allow all crawling toggle and Disallow Paths textarea
Sitemap section has enable toggle and include options (Films, Blog, Armory)
Preview robots.txt link visible and accessible
Preview sitemap.xml link visible and accessible
Test Rich Results button visible
Test Rich Results button opens Google Rich Results Test in new tab
Validation status message displays after clicking Test Rich Results
Save All Settings button visible

sections: Global SEO - Site name, URL, meta templates
Organization Schema - JSON-LD structured data settings
Robots.txt - Crawling controls and disallow paths
Sitemap - Enable/disable and content inclusion options

seed_data_creation: Test images created in /tmp for testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All image compression and SEO features fully working. Image uploads auto-compress and convert to WebP by default (can be disabled with convert_webp=false). SEO admin panel at Admin > Studio > SEO provides centralized control. Test Rich Results button opens Google's validation tool. Robots.txt and sitemap.xml endpoints generate dynamic content based on admin settings and database content.
